query: SELECT r.id, r.formId, r.respondentName, r.isComplete, r.validationStatus, r.createdAt, f.title as form_title, f.isTemplate, f.parentFormId, f.createdByStaffId FROM form_responses r JOIN forms f ON r.formId = f.id ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20\G
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2FrvTurB9J6YsbF.19ef00e26ab3 --database bDyKxbJirDkukZmvFFZQ8p --execute SELECT r.id, r.formId, r.respondentName, r.isComplete, r.validationStatus, r.createdAt, f.title as form_title, f.isTemplate, f.parentFormId, f.createdByStaffId FROM form_responses r JOIN forms f ON r.formId = f.id ORDER BY r.createdAt DESC LIMIT 20\G
